data.summary: Zillow is a real estate platform that offers services for buying, renting, selling homes, and obtaining mortgages. It provides users with personalized home recommendations based on their location and search activity. The site features listings for homes across various locations in the U.S. and Canada, and allows users to browse by real estate type, such as rental buildings, apartments, and houses for sale or rent. Additionally, Zillow offers resources related to mortgage rates across different states. The platform dedicates efforts to digital accessibility and compliance with fair housing laws.

## What are today's Alaska refinance rates?

See legal disclosures

### Alaska 30-year fixed refinance rates remain stable at 6.88%

The current average 30-year fixed refinance rate was stable at 6.88%. Alaska's rate of 6.88% is 23 basis points higher than the national average of 6.65%.

Today's rate in Alaska is equal to last week's average of 6.88%.

Additionally, the current average 15-year fixed refinance rate in Alaska remained stable at 6.00% and the current average 5-year ARM refinance rate is equal to 0.00%.

## Refinancing options in Alaska

Refinance rates and mortgage purchase rates are often the same, though refinance rates can occasionally be higher. To get the best refinance rate in Alaska, work on [improving your credit score](https://www.zillow.com/mortgage-learning/mortgage-credit-scores/). It also pays to carefully compare APRs, which include the interest rate and the associated fees, to ensure the best value.

Use a [refinance calculator](https://www.zillow.com/mortgage-calculator/refinance-calculator/) to adjust your rate and loan term to determine the amount you could save off your monthly payment.

Most lenders require a home appraisal during the refinancing process. Do you know [how your home value has changed](https://www.zillow.com/how-much-is-my-home-worth/) since purchase? The current value of your home could impact your equity and potentially help eliminate any private mortgage insurance you’re paying.

Lastly, check [Alaska](https://www.zillow.com/refinance/ak/#top) refinance rates daily to capitalize on the best refinancing opportunity.

data.summary: The page provides information on current refinance rates in Alaska, highlighting that the average 30-year fixed refinance rate is stable at 6.88%. Comparatively, this rate is 23 basis points higher than the national average. The average 15-year fixed rate also holds steady at 6.00%, while the 5-year ARM rate stands at 0.00%. It discusses trends in refinance rates, suggests tools such as mortgage calculators for potential refinancers, and offers resources for comparing refinancing options including rate changes, the importance of credit scores, and the typical appraisal process in refinancing. Key tables provide detailed historical rate data for various loan programs.

data.summary: The content provides an extensive overview of products and categories available on Amazon, including seasonal deals, best sellers, and featured items across various departments such as electronics, beauty, kitchen, and more. It emphasizes ongoing promotions like Mother's Day gifts, tech devices discounts, and spring fitness must-haves. The page layout supports easy navigation with sections dedicated to specific products, allowing customers to quickly find items of interest. There are also personalized recommendations and links to sign in or create an account for tailored suggestions.

## Product Description

The 12" Small Nut Wizard can pick up nuts, fruits or balls about 1/2" to 2" in diameter: we recommend it for the small and large sized native pecans, white oak and crab apples. It weighs about 2.5 lbs. PLEASE DO NOT USE for pine cones, black walnuts or english walnuts it is not made for those particular items.

Amazon Customer

_5 out of 5 stars_

##### This device works well!

The small nut wizard easily picks up acorns, both from the yard and from the driveway or sidewalk. It is best to use it before many leaves fall. It is easy to empty into a bucket or bag. I especially liked that the handle is long enough for a tall person to use without bending over. Acorn "hats" and leaves do occasionally get stuck in the device, but they are easily removed.

##### [_5.0 out of 5 stars_ The perfect tool for the job](https://www.amazon.com/gp/customer-reviews/R1ZOC36BOWX3PF/ref=cm_cr_dp_d_rvw_ttl?ie=UTF8)



Reviewed in the United States on October 16, 2017

[Verified Purchase](https://www.amazon.com/gp/help/customer/display.html/ref=cm_cr_dp_d_rvw_avp?nodeId=G8UYX7LALQC8V9KA)






Bought the Small size to pick up acorns off a Shumardi, a Chinkapin and a White Oak tree. The perfect tool for the job. Exceptionally well built, and makes picking up acorns as easy as it gets. I was surprised at how heavy it feels in your hands. You can either roll it along to pick up acorns on top of the grass, or just push straight downward to pick up those buried in the grass. I built my own unloader to fit a 5 gallon bucket out of an old wire bucket handle. Works great.

I would recommend the Nut Wizard to anyone who has oak trees.

Reviewed in the United States on September 2, 2020

[Verified Purchase](https://www.amazon.com/gp/help/customer/display.html/ref=cm_cr_dp_d_rvw_avp?nodeId=G8UYX7LALQC8V9KA)






I wanted to buy this last fall but they were all sold out. I finally ordered one last week and started using it immediately. This thing really works well on the acorns in my yard. This past spring I was on my hands and knees picking them up but now I just roll it over the acorns and into the basket they go. Unloading is very easy-just spread two wires apart and the acorns spill out. I have a large oak on the side of my front yard and I managed to collect all the acorns that had fallen so far in two days, working an hour and a half each day. if an acorn had settled into the ground I could usually free it with the tip of my shoe. only rarely did I need to bend over and free it with my hand. There are very few things I would take the time to review and this Nut Wizard is one of them because it works so well.

I have never used one before. I ordered the small nut wizard first as I would like to pick up acorns from my yard. I did a bit of research and reviewed comments of a number of similar products and I decided to buy this one. It worked but it did take some effort. I had to push hard to open the wires as I rolled it on the grass with back and forth motions. It worked better on smooth concrete floor. Overall, I would say it works and is definitely much better than picking up the acorns by hands. It saves my spine. From the picture, you can see it picked up acorns, and walnut shells from my yard. But I think the small size may be a bit too small for walnut shells. I also ordered the medium one, I haven't used that yet. The product was well made, it's all metal, no plastic.

##### [_5.0 out of 5 stars_ Picks up walnuts pretty well](https://www.amazon.com/gp/customer-reviews/R3L2T702G7QGGD/ref=cm_cr_dp_d_rvw_ttl?ie=UTF8)\
\
\
\

\

\
\
\
\
\
\
I bought this because another reviewer recommended it over the small of the garden wizard brand. I find this roughly equivalent to the Medium nut wizard brand ( not the small, even though this one is designated small). It can pick up much bigger nuts than you would expect-- even up to the tennis ball sized black walnuts covering our 3/4 acre. However I have kept this to use only on small nuts-- The ones left over after all the nuts with the green rinds on them are picked up-- so the tines don't get spread apart. This sort of picks those up, but not easily. I find I need to scoop them up with a rake and a shovel rather than expect this to gather them.\
\
\
\
The big difference between this and the other brand is the handle. Pro: the handle on this one is longer than the wizard brand but still lightweight. You want it long.\
\
Con: handle comes unscrewed all the time. I mean to get a lock washer and see if that solves the issue.\
\
\
\
If you want to pick up golf ball size nuts or even bigger this works great\

## Product Description\
\
The 12" Small Nut Wizard can pick up nuts, fruits or balls about 1/2" to 2" in diameter: we recommend it for the small and large sized native pecans, white oak and crab apples. It weighs about 2.5 lbs. PLEASE DO NOT USE for pine cones, black walnuts or english walnuts it is not made for those particular items.\

metadata.title: Amazon.com: Nut Wizard- Pecan Picker Upper- Small : Patio, Lawn & Garden
metadata.description: Buy Nut Wizard- Pecan Picker Upper- Small on Amazon.com ✓ FREE SHIPPING on qualified orders

data.summary: The page focuses on the Garden Weasel Small Nut Gatherer, a nut collecting tool designed for picking up small nuts and fruits ranging from 1/2" to 2" in diameter. Key features include an ergonomic handle, a durable steel cage, and a lightweight design (approx. 2.5 lbs). The product is DOT sure to be effective for acorns, crab apples, and hickory nuts but is not suitable for larger items like pine cones or black walnuts. It holds an average rating of 3.6 out of 5 stars based on 102 reviews, with users appreciating its ease of use and effectiveness while also noting some limitations with smaller nuts in grass. Available for a price of $64.95, it is also highlighted for its ease of emptying into a container.

## From the manufacturer

![Straight-Power-12](https://images-na.ssl-images-amazon.com/images/G/01/x-locale/common/grey-pixel.gif)

WORLD CLASS SILENCE AND EFFICIENCY

### German Engineering - German Design - German Quality - German Performance

![01](https://images-na.ssl-images-amazon.com/images/G/01/x-locale/common/grey-pixel.gif)

#### Highly Efficient Operation

Straight Power 12 is a future-proof ATX 3.0 power supply with 80 PLUS Platinum certification and virtually inaudible operation.

![02](https://images-na.ssl-images-amazon.com/images/G/01/x-locale/common/grey-pixel.gif)

#### Future-Proof Your System

Straight Power 12 is an ATX 3.0 PSU that comes with both native integration of the 12VHPWR connector for next-generation PCIe 5.0 graphics cards, and 4 PCIe 6+2-pin connectors for support of current-gen GPUs. This makes the PSU extremely versatile and the perfect choice for powerful systems of today and the ones to come.

![03](https://images-na.ssl-images-amazon.com/images/G/01/x-locale/common/grey-pixel.gif)

#### The New Standard of Power

Straight Power 12 offers continuous power with one massive 12V rail. Even if the graphics card demands excessive power for a short time: the Straight Power 12 handles power excursions up to double its rated power with ease. This ensures reliable operation with the next generation of processors and graphics cards.

### German Engineering - German Design - German Quality - German Performance

![06](https://images-na.ssl-images-amazon.com/images/G/01/x-locale/common/grey-pixel.gif)

#### Flawless Cooling Design

The funnel-shaped fan inlet of the Straight Power 12 increases airflow while reducing unwanted turbulence for a higher cooling performance. The wire-free design inside allows the cool air to reach all components which ultimately leads to a longer lifespan.

![04](https://images-na.ssl-images-amazon.com/images/G/01/x-locale/common/grey-pixel.gif)

#### State-Of-The-Art Technologies

With full bridge LLC Straight Power 12 offers advanced technologies, resulting in higher efficiency, better regulation, and lower ripple noise for an incomparably stable operation.

![05](https://images-na.ssl-images-amazon.com/images/G/01/x-locale/common/grey-pixel.gif)

#### Silent Wings 4 Fan

The high-end Silent Wings fan delivers best-of-class airflow yet produces very little noise. This is thanks to its unique, optimized fan blade design along with an advanced fluid-dynamic bearing and 6-pole fan motor that largely eliminates operational noise, has a super-long life and minimal power consumption.

![07](https://images-na.ssl-images-amazon.com/images/G/01/x-locale/common/grey-pixel.gif)

#### Japanese 105° Capacitors

Only premium components are used in Straight Power 12. That is why this PSU features exclusively high-quality Japanese capacitors. They are rated at 105°C for stability, reliability, and a long operating life.

![08](https://images-na.ssl-images-amazon.com/images/G/01/x-locale/common/grey-pixel.gif)

#### Convenience and Connectivity

Modular, sleeved cables of up to 100cm in length simplify component installation and reduce annoying clutter. This results in increased airflow and improved cooling - even in the largest PC cases.

Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

##### [_5.0 out of 5 stars_ Rock-Solid, Quiet, and Perfect for High-End AI/Gaming Builds](https://www.amazon.com/gp/customer-reviews/R3KYSWW1LGHQM6/ref=cm_cr_dp_d_rvw_ttl?ie=UTF8)



Reviewed in the United States on November 14, 2025

Style: 1500W Platinum ATX3.0 [Verified Purchase](https://www.amazon.com/gp/help/customer/display.html/ref=cm_cr_dp_d_rvw_avp?nodeId=G8UYX7LALQC8V9KA)






I used the be quiet! Straight Power 12 1500W (BN518) to power my new AI server/gaming rig (Asus Z760-F motherboard, Intel 12th Gen i9, 128GB RAM, and an RTX 5700). Installation into an NZXT H9 Flow RGB chassis was completely trouble-free—plenty of cable length, clean connectors, and a straightforward modular layout.



This machine runs 24/7 for AI workloads and gaming, and after over a month of continuous operation, the power supply has been flawless. Voltage delivery has been stable, no hiccups on boot, and my GPU pulls power smoothly whether I'm running models, gaming, or doing heavy multitasking.



As advertised, the PSU is extremely quiet. The 135mm fan barely spins up, even when the system is under load. If you're building something that demands reliability—AI training, local LLMs, 3D rendering, or high-end gaming—this PSU is more than capable.



The ATX 3.1 compliance and PCIe 5.0 support also make it future-proof. It includes connectors for the latest GPUs (12VHPWR) while still offering plenty of 6+2-pin connectors for older cards. I appreciate having the headroom for future GPU upgrades, especially with higher-wattage cards becoming the norm.



Overall, this is a premium, stable, and whisper-quiet power supply that delivers exactly what it promises. I’m very happy with it and highly recommend it. Easy 5 stars.

##### [_4.0 out of 5 stars_ Plenty of quiet, efficient power, not enough cables.](https://www.amazon.com/gp/customer-reviews/R1T1A1Q79MNBC0/ref=cm_cr_dp_d_rvw_ttl?ie=UTF8)



Reviewed in the United States on February 15, 2026

Style: 1500W Platinum ATX3.0 [Verified Purchase](https://www.amazon.com/gp/help/customer/display.html/ref=cm_cr_dp_d_rvw_avp?nodeId=G8UYX7LALQC8V9KA)






This is a solid, quiet, efficient, and very high power PSU. Everything about it is quality. The only downside I ran into is a lack of cables. It’s got 2 600W slots, only one of which I needed, but every other CPU and PCI and SATA/AUX cable is beyond maxed out. There are only 3 SATA/AUX plugs/cables. I have had 1200W PSUs with more and better cables. By better I mean that the mix of SATA/Molex for the 3 provided cables is questionable at best and feels really out of sync with what is otherwise a top notch experience. 4 SATA is all I get on a single cable, with less on the other 2. Would it kill them to at least throw in an 8 device cable? This is a 1500W PSU. It should be expected to support storage oriented builds. Ideally there would be 4 plugs and 4 cables instead of just 3. At this price point coming up short(pun intended) on cable count leaves a bitter taste that didn’t need to be there. Otherwise, it’s a great unit, just not if you need more than a meager amount of SATA/Molex. One star off for making me buy multiple splitters when I should have had what I need in the box.

##### _5.0 out of 5 stars_Excelente PSU.



Reviewed in Mexico on September 22, 2020

Style: 850W Platinum [Verified Purchase](https://www.amazon.com/gp/help/customer/display.html/ref=cm_cr_dp_d_rvw_avp?nodeId=G8UYX7LALQC8V9KA)






Esta claro que por el precio podrías comprar una psu con un poco mas de voltaje. Sin embargo, la marca be quiet se caracteriza por el desarrollo de buenas fuentes de poder y ahora que tienen la certificación platino sobre todo esta serie straight power 11 la hace muy atractiva y es totalmente modular. El nivel de ruido es muy silenciosa, aunque no tiene la tecnología de zero fan mode, pareciera que lo tiene integrado el ventilador no se oye en lo absoluto. Respecto al 850w probablemente fue un poco de overkill ya que planeo meterle una 3080 y un ryzen 7 o 9 aun esperando la zen 3. pero tener un poco extra no hace daño y te deja espacio para futuras upgrades.

Recomendada si quieres una alternativa a una corsair rmx (caracterizada por silenciosa) y con certificación platino.

metadata.description: Buy be quiet! BN517 Straight Power 12-1200w 80 Plus Platinum, ATX 3.0, Modular Power Supply, for PCIe 5.0 GPUs and GPUs with 6+2 pin connectors, Silent 135mm be quiet! Fan - BN517: Internal Power Supplies - Amazon.com ✓ FREE DELIVERY possible on eligible purchases

data.summary:
The be quiet! BN517 Straight Power 12 is a modular power supply designed for high-performance desktop systems. It features 80 PLUS Platinum efficiency, supporting PCIe 5.0 GPUs with 6+2 pin connectors. Key highlights include:
- Wattage: 1200W, ensuring effective power delivery even for demanding components.
- Noise Level: Claims to operate silently at low loads, helped by a specialized 135mm fan.
- Cable Management: Fully modular cables allow for better organization and airflow in cases.
- Durability: Built with high-quality Japanese capacitors rated for 105°C, enhancing reliability.
- Customer Reception: Rated 4.7 out of 5 stars by users, with praise for its quiet operation, efficient power handling, and robust build quality, although some noted a lack of included cables.

## Organic Content Standard 100

* * *

Organic Content Standard (OCS 100) certified products contain organically grown material (>95%) that has been independently verified at each stage of the supply chain, from source to final product. Organic cotton is produced and certified to organic agricultural standards, which require practices to sustain ecosystems. A product must contain at least 50% certified OCS100 material to qualify for Climate Pledge Friendly.

data.summary:
The content provides information on various Goose Down Bedding Comforter Sets available on Amazon. Key highlights include: 
1. **Filter Options** - Users can narrow down their search by various categories like price, customer ratings, and bestsellers. 
2. **Popular Products** - Featured items include comforters from different brands, including Three Geese, with details on materials (e.g., 100% cotton, hypoallergenic), sizes (Queen, King), and fill power. 
3. **Sustainability Information** - Some products are OEKO-TEX Standard 100 certified, indicating they are safe for human health and produced without harmful chemicals. 
4. **Customer Ratings and Pricing** - Most featured products highlight their overall ratings (usually above 4 stars) and current prices with potential discounts and delivery options. 
5. **Promotions** - There are limited time deals, suggesting certain products may be available at a reduced price.

metadata.title: Amazon.com: VETLIGHT Red Light for Dogs, Cats, Horses and Other Animals. : Health & Household
metadata.description: Amazon.com: VETLIGHT Red Light for Dogs, Cats, Horses and Other Animals. : Health & Household

data.summary: The content discusses the VETLIGHT Red Light Device designed for pets such as dogs, cats, and horses, which utilizes powerful red LED light therapy. It highlights the product's features, benefits, and user reviews. The device is portable, cordless, effective for treating various conditions, and comes highly recommended by users. The current price is $89.99, and it boasts a 4.1 out of 5 stars rating based on 45 reviews. Users report positive results in pain relief and improving their pets' conditions.

## Product Description

Healthy Ceramic Cookware Set - Crafted from natural ceramic, this cookware set is free of intentionally added PFOA, PTFE, PFAS, lead, and cadmium. It's stylish, functional, and safe for cooking. Natural Nonstick - Ceramic non-stick lets food slide off effortlessly. Only requiring a teaspoon of oil, which makes cooking and cleaning up a breeze. Dishwasher Safe - This upgraded set features a fully coated bottom that resists discoloration and prevents black residue. Keep your hands, towels, and countertops spotless, while enjoying effortless cleanup—even after repeated dishwashing. Enhanced Induction Base Design - A specially engineered base surface increases contact with induction cooktops, ensuring faster heating and steady, even heat distribution. 15 Piece Pans Set Includes - a 9.5" Fry Pan with lid，12 inch frying pan, 11 inch saute pan with lid, 5.6QT casserole with lid, 2.1QT saucepan with lid, 2pcs all-silicone utensils, 3pcs pot protectors, 2pcs silicone helper cover. Ergonomic design - The thoughtfully designed knob doubles as a built-in spoon and spatula rest - keeping your tools and countertops clean. Pouring Spout - Both saute pan and saucepan are designed with a pouring spout for easy pouring of soup.

metadata.description: Shop SENSARTE at the Amazon Cookware store. Free Shipping on eligible items. Everyday low prices, save up to 50%.
metadata.title: Amazon.com: SENSARTE Ceramic Nonstick Cookware Set 15 Piece, includes 9.5 Inch Omelet Pan with Lid, Induction Compatible Frying Pan Skillet: Home & Kitchen

data.summary:
The SENSARTE Ceramic Nonstick Cookware Set is a 15-piece set that includes various pans designed for healthy cooking. Key features include:
- **Composition**: Made from natural ceramic, free from harmful chemicals like PFOA, PTFE, PFAS, lead, and cadmium.
- **Nonstick Surface**: Designed for easy food release, requiring minimal oil for cooking.
- **Dishwasher Safe**: The cookware features a fully coated bottom that resists discoloration and is easy to clean.
- **Enhanced Induction Base**: A specially designed base for superior heat distribution, compatible with induction cooktops.
- **Included Items**: The set consists of a 9.5" frying pan with a lid, a 12-inch frying pan, an 11-inch sauté pan with a lid, a 5.6QT casserole with lid, a 2.1QT saucepan with lid, and various utensils and pot protectors.
- **Ergonomic Design**: Features like built-in spoon rests and pouring spouts make cooking easier and cleaner.

data.summary:
The page provides results for the search term "pencils budget pick" on Amazon, featuring a selection of pencil products, particularly motivational and colorful pencils. Key highlights include: 

1. **Popular Listings** : Products like 60 Pcs Motivational Pencils and 100 Pcs Motivational Pencils, both highly rated (4.7 stars) with competitive pricing ($8.99 and $13.99 respectively).
2. **Variety** : Other options include colored pencils suitable for artistic use, erasers, and pencil cases, varying in size and price points.
3. **Customer Reviews** : The listings present average customer reviews, showcasing buyer feedback and popularity trends.
4. **Delivery Options** : Free delivery on qualifying orders, with expedited shipping options available.
5. **Small Business Focus** : Some products support small business brands available on Amazon.

# About this item

- Quality Material: Our magnetic clasps are made of silver and magnet;They are sturdy and solid,which can retain their colors and shape after a long time use.Allergy free, It won’t ever turn your skin green
- Effortless Wear: Our magnetic jewelry clasps simplifies the process of putting on necklaces and bracelets, ensuring a hassle-free experience for every wearer
- Dual Spring Design: Our necklace clasp features two spring round clasps, making it easier to wear jewelry and slightly extending the length of bracelets and necklaces for customers
- Easy to Use: MKCYD's magnet clasp features a simple yet effective design. Simply attach each side of the clasp to your jewelry, and they instantly snap together, making it effortless to wear necklaces without the hassle of traditional clasps
- Widely Used: Our magnetic jewelry clasps are simple and stylish, perfect for wearing with necklaces or extending bracelets. Ideal for making necklaces, bracelets, anklets, or other DIY jewelry. Great for adding a special touch to your creations

##### My go-to for necklace making

Just what I needed. I make jewelry so I removed the extra little clasp on each side. Magnetic strength is perfect for necklaces. I’ve used them on bracelets but I wouldn’t recommend because they have a tendency to slip off with daily activities (i.e., rummaging through bag or taking jackets off). That doesn’t mean this is a bad product—it’s just the nature of magnets. Will keep buying 👍🏼

metadata.title: Amazon.com: MKCYD Double Magnetic Necklace Clasps and Closures, Necklace Extenders for Women, 14K Gold and Silver Magnetic Jewelry Clasps for Bracelets

data.summary: This product is the "MKCYD Double Magnetic Necklace Clasps and Closures" designed for necklaces and bracelets, available in 14K gold and silver. It features strong magnets, is made from allergy-free materials, and offers a hassle-free experience for users, especially beneficial for individuals with dexterity issues. The product has received a 4.7 out of 5 stars rating based on 344 reviews, indicating high customer satisfaction. Priced at $7.99, it includes options like 6pcs or 12pcs in various colors. Customers appreciate its functionality, magnetic strength, and ease of use.

# About this item

- 💙【COMPATIBILITY】- Stubby Front Bumper Compatible for Jeep 2007 2008 2009 2010 2011 2012 2013 2014 2015 2016 2017 2018 Wrangler JK/JKU Unlimited, 2018 2019 2020 2021 2022 2023 2024 2025 2026 Wrangler JL/JLU Unlimited, 2019 2020 2021 2022 2023 2024 2025 2026 Gladiator JT; including 2 Doors / 4 Doors models. (Dose not fit for 2017 JK Rubicon Recon model.)
- 💙 【D-RING AND WINCH PLATE】- Front bumpers have two 4.75-ton high-strength D-ring mounting seats welded into the bumper. A total of 2x 4.75T D-rings are provided. The maximum tension can support 9500 pounds. The front bumper contains a built-in winch plate that can support a 12,000-pound winch. inside and outside of the D-ring mount are mechanically welded to achieve maximum strength.
- 💙 【CORROSION RESISTANCE FINISH & PAINTABLE TRIM】- Two stage finish using E-Coat pre-coating and high-grade textured black powder coating for long lasting corrosion resistance.The pretreated trim can be easily removed for customized painting, match the body color or individuation decal. Pre-coated surface for better painting quality and rust resistant.
- 💙【LIGHTWEIGHT PERFORMANCE】- Less weight means less fuel consumption, faster acceleration, better breaking, and less sag on your suspension. At only 57 lbs, One person can install it! Equipped with 2PCS high powered LED light, Stubby front bumper is ideal for owners who like to run the trails late at night.
- 💙【PACKAGE INCLUDED】- 1x front bumper, 2x 4 inch LED lights, 2x 4.75 tons D-ring with isolator, 1x set of screws, This front bumper we are warranty for 12 months from the date of the purchase.Any question please contact us directly, we are always online.

## Product description

![Front Bumper for Jeep 2018-2026 Wrangler JL &amp; Unlimited JLU Gladiator JT, 2017-2018 JK](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/91ece28a-c499-4989-bab3-47481964abc4.__CR0,0,970,600_PT0_SX970_V1___.jpg)

### Rock Crawler Off-Road Full Width Front Bumper with 2 x D-ring & Winch Plate Mounting & Fog Light Housing

Compatibility:

- Fits for Jeep 2007, 2008, 2009, 2010, 2011, 2012, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018 Wrangler JK/JKU 2-Door & 4-Door All Models
- Fits for Jeep 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025, 2026 Wrangler JL/JLU 2-Door & 4-Door All Models
- Fits for Jeep 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2023, 2024, 2025, 2026 Gladiator JT

Specifications:

- Type: Front Bumper Protector
- Primary Color: Black
- Material: Alloy Steel
- Surface Finish: Black Powder Coated Steel
- Installation-type: Direct bolt-on withno drilling required
- Attachment Type: Bolts, Rivets, Screws
- Placement on vehicle: Front
- Product Dimensions: 45.2 x 16.1 x 11.3 inches
- Item Weight: 56.99 lbs

![Front Bumper for Jeep 2018-2023 Wrangler JL &amp; Unlimited JLU Gladiator JT, 2017-2018 JK](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/68d27817-882b-4a7a-9967-ae6817cdede2.__CR0,0,970,600_PT0_SX970_V1___.jpg)

### WHY CHOOSE AN HAWKLEY BUMPER?

- Built-in winch plate: easy to install the winch (the product does not include the winch) the maximum load-bearing capacity of the winch is 12,000 pounds
- 2X built-in lights: powerful 20W (2pcs) LED lights are built into the front bumper to ensure that you are completely at ease during any night adventure.Can also be used as a turn signal
- D-ring: A solid D-ring mounting seat is welded inside and outside. Includes two 4.75 ton D-ring shackles.
- Bolt installation: The bumper was previously bolted to the factory hole, no additional drilling or cutting required

![Front Bumper for Jeep 2018-2023 Wrangler JL &amp; Unlimited JLU Gladiator JT, 2017-2018 JK](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/28f6d34c-ce4e-423e-b951-63440b28c099.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Rugged D-ring Shackles

Two solid D-ring shackle mounts are robotically welded into the front bumper from both the inside and out for maximum strength. Comes with D-Rings with 7/8 inch diameter pins for safe attachment points.

![Front Bumper for Jeep 2018-2023 Wrangler JL &amp; Unlimited JLU Gladiator JT, 2017-2018 JK](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/4e841072-5f39-493a-9383-e35770434507.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Reversible License Plate Holder

Pre-set license plate bracket can be rotated up and down.

![Front Bumper for Jeep 2018-2023 Wrangler JL &amp; Unlimited JLU Gladiator JT, 2017-2018 JK](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/7bdcd9c2-902f-434a-9c00-1831288e2d18.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Built-in 2x Lights

Built-in high powered LED lights on the bumper to ensure complete confidence in any night time adventure.

![Front Bumper for Jeep 2018-2023 Wrangler JL &amp; Unlimited JLU Gladiator JT, 2017-2018 JK](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/ae208b20-b419-42c3-9f79-447f09f0c453.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Full protection front bumper

Manufactured from heavy duty 5/32" steel and 2" x .120 wall steel tubing. Welded hoop protects the front of the car in collisions.

![Front Bumper For Ford 2018 2019 2020 F-150 Pickup Truck](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/2eee453d-7f14-4b80-9e5a-50f2e37998c5.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Corrosion Resistance Finish

Two stage finish using epoxy pre-coating and high-grade textured black powder coating for long lasting corrosion resistance.

![Front Bumper for Jeep 2018-2023 Wrangler JL &amp; Unlimited JLU Gladiator JT, 2017-2018 JK](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/603fbefa-8b87-4f4f-9229-757df4e1983e.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### No Drilling Installation

No-drilling install uses factory mounting points with no relocation required.

![Front Bumper for Jeep 2018-2023 Wrangler JL &amp; Unlimited JLU Gladiator JT, 2017-2018 JK](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/087387cb-cffc-4f02-a614-f3e03de1276a.__CR0,0,970,300_PT0_SX970_V1___.jpg)

# Product Summary: Stubby Front Bumper for 2007-2018 Jeep Wrangler JK/JKU & 2018-2026 Jeep Wrangler JL/JLU, Front Bumper for 2019-2026 Gladiator JT w/Winch Plate & 2x 18W LED Lights & 2x D-rings & License Plate Bracket

From Hawkley

3.1 out of 5 stars, 7 ratings

[Customer reviews](https://www.amazon.com/Hawkley-Compatible-2007-2023-Wrangler-Gladiator/dp/B0CFTNJZ82?ref=dp_product_quick_view#customer-reviews_feature_div)

## Price

One-time purchase: $249.99

[Purchasing options](https://www.amazon.com/Hawkley-Compatible-2007-2023-Wrangler-Gladiator/dp/B0CFTNJZ82?ref=dp_product_quick_view#buybox)

[Other sellers](https://www.amazon.com/Hawkley-Compatible-2007-2023-Wrangler-Gladiator/dp/B0CFTNJZ82?ref=dp_product_quick_view#dynamic-aod-ingress-box)

[Other sellers](https://www.amazon.com/Hawkley-Compatible-2007-2023-Wrangler-Gladiator/dp/B0CFTNJZ82?ref=dp_product_quick_view#unqualifiedBuyBox)

## About this Item

- 💙【COMPATIBILITY】- Stubby Front Bumper Compatible for Jeep 2007 2008 2009 2010 2011 2012 2013 2014 2015 2016 2017 2018 Wrangler JK/JKU Unlimited, 2018 2019 2020 2021 2022 2023 2024 2025 2026 Wrangler JL/JLU Unlimited, 2019 2020 2021 2022 2023 2024 2025 2026 Gladiator JT; including 2 Doors / 4 Doors models. (Dose not fit for 2017 JK Rubicon Recon model.)
- 💙 【D-RING AND WINCH PLATE】- Front bumpers have two 4.75-ton high-strength D-ring mounting seats welded into the bumper. A total of 2x 4.75T D-rings are provided. The maximum tension can support 9500 pounds. The front bumper contains a built-in winch plate that can support a 12,000-pound winch. inside and outside of the D-ring mount are mechanically welded to achieve maximum strength.
- 💙 【CORROSION RESISTANCE FINISH & PAINTABLE TRIM】- Two stage finish using E-Coat pre-coating and high-grade textured black powder coating for long lasting corrosion resistance.The pretreated trim can be easily removed for customized painting, match the body color or individuation decal. Pre-coated surface for better painting quality and rust resistant.
- 💙【LIGHTWEIGHT PERFORMANCE】- Less weight means less fuel consumption, faster acceleration, better breaking, and less sag on your suspension. At only 57 lbs, One person can install it! Equipped with 2PCS high powered LED light, Stubby front bumper is ideal for owners who like to run the trails late at night.
- 💙【PACKAGE INCLUDED】- 1x front bumper, 2x 4 inch LED lights, 2x 4.75 tons D-ring with isolator, 1x set of screws, This front bumper we are warranty for 12 months from the date of the purchase.Any question please contact us directly, we are always online.

## Product Description

COMPATIBILITY WITH:


✔️For Jeep 2017 2008 2009 2010 2011 2012 2013 2014 2015 2016 2017 2018 Wrangler JK/JKU Unlimited 2-Door & 4-Door Models

✔️For Jeep 2018 2019 2020 2021 2022 2023 Wrangler JL/JLU Unlimited 2-Door & 4-Door Models

✔️For Jeep 2019 2020 2021 2022 2023 Gladiator JT 2-Door & 4-Door Models

SPECIFICATION:

Type: Front Bumper

Material: Steel

Surface Finish: Black Textured Powder-Coated Steel

Product Dimensions: 45.2 x 16.1 x 11.3 inches

Item Weight: 56.99 lbs

PACKAGE INCLUDES:

1x Front Bumper

2x D-Ring Shackles

2x LED Lights

1x Installation Manual

1x Set of Mounting Accessories

✔️WINCH PLATE MOUNTING

An integrated in-bumper design prevents roller fairlead interference and maximizes utility. Standardized bolt pattern accommodates any brand of winch up to a 12,000 lb. capacity.

✔️DEMONSTRATE YOUR PERSONALITIES

Spray paint your bumper to enhance your individuality and aesthetics. Give your car a catchy look and hue and bring new life to the glossy finish.

Warm Tip: You have better install the bumper on the car after the re-spray is completely dry.

✔️2X BUILT-IN LIGHTS

The front bumper has built-in powerful 2pcs LED lights to ensure complete confidence in any night time adventure.

✔️2X D-RING

Shackle mounts are Robotic-welded onto the bumper from the inside and outside for maximum strength. Include 4.75 ton capacity D-rings are ¾” diameter, with a 7/8” diameter pin, and can support up to 9,500 lbs.

metadata.title: Amazon.com: Stubby Front Bumper for 2007-2018 Jeep Wrangler JK/JKU & 2018-2026 Jeep Wrangler JL/JLU, Front Bumper for 2019-2026 Gladiator JT w/Winch Plate & 2x 18W LED Lights & 2x D-rings & License Plate Bracket : Automotive
metadata.description: Buy Stubby Front Bumper for 2007-2018 Jeep Wrangler JK/JKU & 2018-2026 Jeep Wrangler JL/JLU, Front Bumper for 2019-2026 Gladiator JT w/Winch Plate & 2x 18W LED Lights & 2x D-rings & License Plate Bracket: Bumpers - Amazon.com ✓ FREE DELIVERY possible on eligible purchases

data.summary: The page provides detailed information on the Hawkley Stubby Front Bumper designed for various Jeep models (2007-2026 Wrangler JK/JL and Gladiator JT). Key features include: compatibility with both 2-door and 4-door variants, a built-in winch plate supporting up to 12,000 pounds, corrosion-resistant finishes, and lightweight design allowing for easy installation. The bumper also comes with two LED lights and D-rings. The item retails for $249.99 and has a mixed customer rating of 3.1 out of 5 stars based on 7 reviews. It includes a one-year warranty.

# About this item

- Professional 0.5mm Drawing Pencil: A premium mechanical pencil featuring a metal comfort-grip and clip for precise control and durability. The anti-slip grip reduces hand fatigue, making it perfect for extended writing, detailed sketching, and marathon study sessions
- Mechanical Pencil Set: The package includes everything you need: one 0.5mm mechanical pencil, one tube of 60 HB high-quality lead refills, a large 4B eraser, plus a tube of 9 mini erasers that conveniently fit into the pencil's end cap
- Break-Resistant HB Lead: Equipped with smooth, high-density HB lead that resists breaking and smudging for clean, consistent lines. The reliable click-advance mechanism ensures steady lead extension, perfect for exams, drafting, and artistic projects without interruptions
- Engineered for Comfort & Control: The ergonomic, metal grip provides superior balance and a professional feel. Its design ensures ideal weight distribution and anti-slip control for detailed technical drawing, note-taking, and everyday writing tasks
- Perfect Gift for All Creators: An ideal, ready-to-gift tool for students, artists, engineers, and professionals. A dependable choice for school supplies, office use, creative projects, exams, or daily desk use. Its professional quality makes it a standout gift for any occasion

- ### Is this a complete mechanical pencil set, or do I need to buy anything else separately?


Yes, it's a complete all-in-one set! It includes the 0.7mm pencil, a tube of 60 HB lead refills, a large 4B eraser, and 9 mini erasers that store in the cap. You get everything to start and continue writing or drawing for a long time.

- ### How does the pencil feel in hand during long writing sessions?


It's designed for comfort! The metal knurled grip is anti-slip and provides excellent control. Substantial weight which reduces hand fatigue, making it perfect for extended use like studying or sketching.

- ### Is the lead prone to breaking? Is it good for exams and precise work?


It uses high-density, break-resistant HB lead for clean, consistent lines with minimal smudging. The reliable click-advance mechanism feeds lead steadily. For optimal performance and to prevent lead retraction.

- ### Who is this pencil best suited for?


It's a versatile tool for almost anyone! Students appreciate it for exams and note-taking. Artists and engineers use it for sketching and drafting. Professionals find it great for office work.

Amazon Customer

_5 out of 5 stars_

##### Complete mechanical pencil kit with solid performance

This mechanical pencil set is a fantastic value and comes with everything you need. Along with the pencil itself, it includes 60 lead refills, a hand eraser, and 9 cap erasers. The build feels solid and well crafted. The textured metal grip is cool to the touch and adds a premium feel. I also appreciate that the metal tip retracts with the lead, making it easy to carry without worrying about pokes or damage. Even though it uses thinner 0.5 millimeter lead, it writes smoothly and holds up well whether you’re jotting soft notes or pressing harder. I had no issues with breakage or skipping. I actually forgot how much I paid until checking my order history for this review. At just 8 dollars, I was genuinely surprised. For comparison, I recently returned from Japan where I bought a couple mechanical pencils for 15 to 20 dollars each, and had to pay extra for lead and erasers. This set is a bargain considering how well made and complete it is.

The STAGEEK 0.5mm mechanical pencil is a solid drafting tool for artists and students alike. The metal barrel feels sturdy and well-balanced in hand, giving it a premium feel despite the affordable price. The 0.5mm lead produces clean, precise lines ideal for technical drawing and detailed sketches. The included eraser works adequately for minor corrections, and the 60 HB lead refills provide great value. The click mechanism is smooth and consistent. My only minor gripe is that the grip section could use a bit more texture for longer drawing sessions. Overall, a reliable mechanical pencil that delivers on its promises.

metadata.title: Amazon.com : STAGEEK 0.5mm Mechanical Pencil, Metal Art & Drafting Pencil with Eraser and 60 HB Lead Refills, Professional Drawing Pencil for Artists, Students, School, Office, Writing, Sketching, Drafting(Black) : Office Products

data.summary: The STAGEEK 0.5mm Mechanical Pencil is a robust drawing and drafting tool designed for both artists and professionals. This pencil features a metal grip for comfort and anti-slip control, making it ideal for extended use, and comes with a set of 60 lead refills and erasers. Highlighted attributes include break-resistant lead, a smooth click-advance mechanism, and an ergonomic design that ensures comfort. Users praise it for its quality, affordability, and performance, making it an appealing choice for anyone needing a reliable writing instrument.
